description: Wire the existing AI feedback signal (thumbs up/down in AIInsightCard + AIIntelligenceSheet AIFeedbackView) into a real reinforcement loop. RecommendationMemory storage layer already exists (record/outcomes/acceptanceRate/frequentlyDismissedSignals/clearAll) and has unit tests, but is per-AIOrchestrator-instance — not wired into views. C5 closes the deferred audit UI-024 by promoting RecommendationMemory to an injectable EnvironmentObject, wiring the actual record() call from AIInsightCard.recordFeedback (replacing the existing no-op comment block), feeding back into AIOrchestrator's recommendation pipeline (suppress signals with high dismiss-count + boost segments with high acceptance-rate), and surfacing a Settings → AI Feedback row showing history + GDPR clear-all. Pairs with D1 (adaptive-intelligence next pass).

scope_known_gap.deferred_comment_at_AIInsightCard_record: RESOLVED 2026-06-01 in T6 (commit c476572) — replaced UI-024 deferred block with feedbackController.record(outcome:) call.
scope_known_gap.what_c5_adds_beyond_wiring: Reinforcement loop in AIOrchestrator + Settings → AI Feedback management surface + dismiss-reason picker + 3 new analytics events

tasks.title: AnalyticsService — 3 new logAi* methods + AnalyticsProvider constants
Test suite — 4 new test files, 14 tests, all passing

primary_metric: home_ai_feedback_submitted events per WAU >= 0.10 at T+30d (T1, baseline 0.03)
success_metrics: home_ai_feedback_submitted events per WAU (T1, baseline 0.03 → target >=0.10 at T+30d)
acceptance rate >=0.6 in >=2 segments (T1, baseline nil → target met at T+30d)
recommendation fatigue rate declining trend (T2, declining over 14d window)
Settings AI Feedback opt-out rate <=20% (T2, kill criterion)
kill_criteria: Acceptance rate at T+14d < pre-C5 baseline (loop made things worse)
home_ai_feedback_submitted event volume declines (UX broke feedback surface)
Settings AI Feedback opt-out rate >20% (signal overcorrection)
User-reported wrong-suppression via dismiss-reason disagree count >20% of total dismissals
